title: hieracium murorum subsp. pleiophyllogenes
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pleiophyllogenes, also known as Hill hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. pleiophyllogenes include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive problems and support overall well-being.
